See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 25729 => 'Leo', 2576 => 'Viettel', 25771 => 'Leo', 25772 => 'Leo', 25775 => 'Smart Mobile', 25776 => 'Leo', 25777 => 'Onatel', 25778 => 'Smart Mobile', 25779 => 'Leo', ];
